# BaseMod Homes

> Modern modular homes with transparent, all-in pricing. BaseMod is building the infrastructure to make homeownership accessible again — combining factory-built quality with site-built finish, delivered to communities across the Midwest.

BaseMod Homes designs, manufactures, and installs CrossMod® and IRC-code modular homes. Our buyers see the installed price upfront — no weeks of estimates, no "it depends." We standardize the parts of homebuilding that should be standard so timelines, quality, and pricing stay predictable.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of BaseMod Homes, featured models, and our approach to attainable homeownership.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): The end-to-end BaseMod process from selection through installation.
- [Models](/models): The full BaseMod home lineup — Aspen, Belmont, Keeneland, Hawthorne, Laurel, and Cypress.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Transparent all-in pricing methodology and what's included.
- [Mission](/mission): Why we exist and the housing problem we're solving.
- [About](/about): The team and story behind BaseMod Homes.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch, request a quote, or schedule a conversation.
- [Developments](/developments): Active BaseMod communities and available homesites.

## Models

- [Aspen](/models/aspen): 1,620 sq ft, 4 bed / 2 bath efficient plan on a 32×60 footprint.
- [Belmont](/models/belmont): 1,620 sq ft, 3 bed / 2 bath compact plan for tighter setbacks.
- [Keeneland](/models/keeneland): 1,635 sq ft modern 3 bed / 2 bath designed for flexible exteriors.
- [Hawthorne](/models/hawthorne): Modern barndominium-inspired open-concept design.
- [Laurel](/models/laurel): 1,065 sq ft 3 bed plan with flexible garage options.
- [Cypress](/models/cypress): 990 sq ft compact 2 bed plan ideal for narrow lots and ADUs.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How BaseMod handles personal information.
